topics.label: LLM / Foundation Models

topics.label: LLM Reasoning / Planning
topics.description: reasoning, chain-of-thought, planning, decomposition, deliberation, search, or structured decision-making in language models

topics.label: Multimodal Models
topics.description: vision-language, audio-language, multimodal fusion, cross-modal generation, or multimodal understanding

topics.label: Retrieval / RAG / Search
topics.description: retrieval-augmented generation, dense retrieval, ranking, search, indexing, or memory retrieval systems

topics.label: Agents / Tool Use
topics.description: language agents, tool use, external actions, workflow agents, planning with tools, or agentic systems

topics.label: Alignment / Preference / Safety
topics.zh_label: 对齐 / 偏好学习 / 安全
topics.description: alignment, reward models, RLHF, DPO, harmlessness, red teaming, safety evaluation, or preference optimization

topics.label: Evaluation / Benchmarks
topics.description: benchmarks, evaluation frameworks, challenge sets, datasets, leaderboards, or measurement methodology

topics.label: Efficient Tuning / Inference
topics.description: parameter-efficient fine-tuning, quantization, pruning, distillation, sparse inference, caching, or deployment efficiency

topics.label: Long Context / Memory
topics.description: context extension, memory mechanisms, long-sequence modeling, recurrent memory, or context compression

topics.label: Data Curation / Synthetic Data
topics.zh_label: 数据构建 / 合成数据
topics.description: data filtering, data mixtures, synthetic data generation, curriculum data design, or dataset construction for training

topics.label: Representation / Self-Supervised Learning
topics.zh_label: 表征学习 / 自监督学习
topics.description: self-supervised learning, contrastive learning, masked modeling, representation learning, or unsupervised pretraining

topics.label: Diffusion / Generative Modeling
topics.description: diffusion models, score matching, generative modeling, image generation, video generation, or probabilistic generation

topics.label: 3D Vision / Geometry
topics.description: 3D reconstruction, novel view synthesis, point clouds, geometry, pose, meshes, or scene representation

topics.label: Video / Temporal Vision
topics.description: video understanding, temporal modeling, action recognition, motion, video generation, or time-aware vision

topics.label: Detection / Segmentation / Tracking
topics.zh_label: 检测 / 分割 / 跟踪
topics.description: object detection, instance segmentation, semantic segmentation, panoptic segmentation, or tracking

topics.label: Graph Learning
topics.description: graph neural networks, graph representation learning, graph reasoning, or graph data mining

topics.label: Reinforcement Learning
topics.description: reinforcement learning, offline RL, exploration, control, policy optimization, reward design, or decision-making

topics.label: Optimization / Training Dynamics
topics.description: optimizers, convergence, loss landscapes, grokking, scaling laws, curriculum, or training behavior

topics.label: Theory / Generalization
topics.description: theoretical analysis, learning theory, guarantees, bounds, expressivity, or generalization theory

topics.label: OOD / Robustness
topics.zh_label: 分布外泛化 / 鲁棒性
topics.description: out-of-distribution generalization, domain shift, adversarial robustness, uncertainty, calibration, or robustness under shift

topics.label: Causality / Fairness / Privacy
topics.zh_label: 因果 / 公平 / 隐私
topics.description: causal inference, fairness, bias, privacy, differential privacy, responsible AI, or societal risk

topics.label: Federated / Distributed Learning
topics.description: federated learning, distributed optimization, communication efficiency, decentralized learning, or privacy-preserving collaboration

topics.label: Medical / Bio AI
topics.description: medical AI, biomedical NLP, protein modeling, genomics, computational biology, or healthcare applications

topics.label: Scientific AI
topics.description: scientific machine learning, PDEs, simulation, scientific discovery, physics-informed models, or scientific workflows

topics.label: Time Series / Forecasting
topics.description: time series, forecasting, event prediction, temporal regression, or sequential prediction outside core video tasks

topics.label: Speech / Audio
topics.description: speech recognition, speech synthesis, audio understanding, speaker tasks, or audio generation

topics.label: Multilingual / Translation
topics.description: multilingual NLP, cross-lingual transfer, machine translation, low-resource language modeling, or language diversity

topics.label: Code / Math / Formal Reasoning
topics.zh_label: 代码 / 数学 / 形式推理
topics.description: code generation, theorem proving, symbolic reasoning, math reasoning, program synthesis, or formal verification

topics.label: Robotics / Embodied AI
topics.description: robotics, embodied agents, manipulation, navigation, policy learning in embodied environments, or world-grounded control

topics.label: Knowledge Editing / Unlearning
topics.zh_label: 知识编辑 / 机器遗忘
topics.description: model editing, factual updates, machine unlearning, memory removal, or controlled forgetting

topics.description: model security, jailbreaks, prompt attacks, adversarial attacks, defenses, vulnerability discovery, or secure ML

topics.label: Other / Misc
topics.description: use only when no better tag from the taxonomy clearly fits the paper
